a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INNPP are currently 
referred to as standard retail pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the meaning of 
the variable, and the data values are the same over time.
